'''yazava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:reacquirement|reacquirement]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-z-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reacquirement|reacquirement]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yazava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæzævæth|yæzævæth]] || [[word:yæzævæj|yæzævæj]] || [[word:yæzævæsh|yæzævæsh]] || [[word:yæzævæ|yæzævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yazazavath|yazazavath]] || [[word:yazazavaj|yazazavaj]] || [[word:yazazavash|yazazavash]] || [[word:yazazava|yazazava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yazavath|yazavath]] || [[word:yazavaj|yazavaj]] || [[word:yazavash|yazavash]] || [[word:yazava|yazava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yazafvath|yazafvath]] || [[word:yazafvaj|yazafvaj]] || [[word:yazafvash|yazafvash]] || [[word:yazafvaf|yazafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yazavatha|yazavatha]] || [[word:yazavaja|yazavaja]] || [[word:yazavasha|yazavasha]] || [[word:yazavaka|yazavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yazavath|yazavath]] || [[word:yazavaj|yazavaj]] || [[word:yazavash|yazavash]] || [[word:yazava|yazava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yazavathal|yazavathal]] || [[word:yazavajal|yazavajal]] || [[word:yazavashal|yazavashal]] || [[word:yazavakal|yazavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yazavathatha|yazavathatha]] || [[word:yazavajaja|yazavajaja]] || [[word:yazavashasha|yazavashasha]] || [[word:yazavaka|yazavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yazavathan|yazavathan]] || [[word:yazavajan|yazavajan]] || [[word:yazavashan|yazavashan]] || [[word:yazavakan|yazavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yazavathaoro|yazavathaoro]] || [[word:yazavajaoro|yazavajaoro]] || [[word:yazavashaoro|yazavashaoro]] || [[word:yazavakaoro|yazavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
